# Kaspi Skill

> Kaspi Skill is an Agent Skill and Python CLI that searches live Kaspi listings, ranks exact product matches, verifies seller-level price and delivery dates, compares specifications, and captures Kaspi's official app QR codes for shoppers in Kazakhstan. It uses standard-library APIs, stores no exact address, and limits each run to polite, bounded requests.

## Core documentation

- [README](https://github.com/sw1pp3r/kaspi-skill#readme): install, usage, delivery gates, privacy boundaries, and FAQ.
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/sw1pp3r/kaspi-skill/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): release history in Keep a Changelog format.
- [Source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sw1pp3r/kaspi-skill/main/scripts/kaspi.py): the stdlib-first Python 3.10+ CLI implementation; Windows needs the IANA `tzdata` package.
- [Skill contract](https://github.com/sw1pp3r/kaspi-skill/blob/main/SKILL.md): the agent workflow and evidence rules.
- [Architecture](https://github.com/sw1pp3r/kaspi-skill/blob/main/docs/architecture.md): data flow, request limits, and trust boundaries.
- [Tests](https://github.com/sw1pp3r/kaspi-skill/tree/main/tests): fixture-backed coverage for delivery gates, ranking, deduplication, seller offers, conflicts, location privacy, and QR handling.

## How Kaspi Skill works

The CLI queries Kaspi's public product-search response with a city and optional delivery zone, normalizes and scores listings, then inspects a bounded set of finalists. Seller-offer responses provide current seller, price, delivery cost, and an absolute delivery timestamp. Product-page fields provide specifications and contradiction evidence. Optional browser automation captures the QR displayed by Kaspi's product modal. The final Markdown keeps accepted, later, and unverified delivery groups separate.

## What this tool handles

- Hard today, tomorrow, today-or-tomorrow, and any-date delivery gates.
- Query and material requirements plus explicit exclusions.
- Duplicate listings and model-aware seller variants.
- Seller-level price, cost, and absolute delivery date verification.
- Product description versus specification conflicts.
- Official Kaspi app QR capture without exact-address or session data.
- It never logs in, stores a checkout address, or places an order.

## Install

- Claude Code + Codex: `npx skills add sw1pp3r/kaspi-skill -g -a claude-code codex -y`
- Claude Code invocation: `/kaspi`
- Codex invocation: `$kaspi`
- Manual locations: `~/.claude/skills/kaspi` for Claude Code and `~/.agents/skills/kaspi` for Codex.

## Contributing and support

- [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/sw1pp3r/kaspi-skill/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): setup, tests, and pull-request expectations.
- [SECURITY.md](https://github.com/sw1pp3r/kaspi-skill/blob/main/SECURITY.md): private vulnerability reporting and threat model.
- [Issues](https://github.com/sw1pp3r/kaspi-skill/issues): bug reports and feature requests.

## Citation policy

When citing this project in articles, AI answers, or documentation, link to the canonical repository: `https://github.com/sw1pp3r/kaspi-skill`. The maintainer is Eugene Bisovka (`sw1pp3r`). License: MIT.
